title: Gabe Jones
content:
{{CharHub|Gabe Jones|Gabe Jones}} {{Character |image = Gabriel Jones.jpg |real name = Gabriel Jones |alias = {{Alias |primary = Gabe Jones{{Ref|CATFA}} |derivatives = }} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |DOB = [[1918|August 14, 1918]][[:File:SSR files 2.jpg|S.H.I.E.L.D. Files]] |affiliation = [[Howard University]] (formerly)

''[[Spider-Man: Homecoming]]'' (photo)}}}} |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.]]'' (photo & mentioned)}}}} |comic = ''[[Captain America: First Vengeance]]''
''[[Captain America: The First Avenger Adaptation]]'' |actor = [[Derek Luke]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Who are you supposed to be?"
"I'm... Captain America.|Gabe Jones and [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]|Captain America: The First Avenger}} Private '''Gabriel "Gabe" Jones''' was a [[United States Army]] soldier during [[World War II]] and a member of the [[Howling Commandos]]. ==Biography== ===[[World War II]]=== {{Quote|There's got to be at least five mortar companies out there!"
"Get ahold of B Company, tell them we need cover!"
"That might be tough.|[[Dum Dum Dugan]], [[Bucky Barnes]] and Gabe Jones|Captain America: The First Avenger}} A native of [[Macon]], [[Georgia (State)|Georgia]], Gabe Jones studied German and French{{Ref|CATFA}} at [[Howard University]]{{Ref|GttMCUCATFA}} before joining the [[United States Army]]. Jones would eventually join the {{WPS|92nd Infantry Division (United States)|92nd Infantry}}, a unit he described as "All black, all proud."{{Ref|CAFV7}} In [[1943]], while fighting alongside [[Bucky Barnes]] and [[Dum Dum Dugan]], Jones was captured by [[Hydra]] and placed in a cell with other allied prisoners where he was forced to build powerful weapons for his enemy.{{Ref|CATFA}} ====Breakout==== {{Quote|That one. Zündung."
"Zündung?"
"Get this thing going, Dugan!|Gabe Jones, [[Dum Dum Dugan]] and [[James Montgomery Falsworth]]|Captain America: The First Avenger}} [[File:POWs.png|{{AltFloat}}|Jones with the other POWs]] When [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] single-handedly [[Liberation of Allied Prisoners of War|assaulted]] the [[Hydra Base Camp C3|facility]] in which he was a prisoner, Jones, along with his companions, broke free and wreaked havoc on the [[Hydra]] soldiers and the base by controlling a tank with [[Dum Dum Dugan]]. Because Jones spoke fluent German, he could show Dugan how to control the tank while [[James Montgomery Falsworth]] fired the cannon. Jones joined the rest of the rescued unit and returned to a US Military base immediately after.{{Ref|CATFA}} ====Howling Commandos==== [[File:Commando Recruitment 2.png|{{AltFloat}}|Jones joins the [[Howling Commandos]]]] {{Quote|We barely got out of there alive, and you want us to go back?"
"Pretty much.|Gabe Jones and [[Steve Rogers]]|Captain America: The First Avenger}} Shortly after their breakout, Jones and his comrades enjoyed a drink together in an English pub when they were invited by [[Steve Rogers]] to join a special [[Howling Commandos|elite squadron]] led by Rogers himself. Jones, after a brief conversation with [[Jacques Dernier]], happily accepted alongside [[Dum Dum Dugan]], [[James Montgomery Falsworth]] and [[Jim Morita]].{{Ref|CATFA}} ====[[Capture of Arnim Zola]]==== [[File:Gabe Thompson.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Jones during a mission in [[World War II]]]] {{Quote|You were right, Doctor [[Arnim Zola|Zola]]'s on the [[Schnellzug EB912|train]]. [[Hydra]] dispatcher gave him permission to open up the throttle. Wherever he's going, they must need him bad.|Gabe Jones to [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]|Captain America: The First Avenger}} Along with the other [[Howling Commandos]], Jones took part in many assaults against [[Hydra]]. This included a mission to capture [[Arnim Zola]]. Jones, [[Bucky Barnes]] and Steve Rogers boarded the [[Schnellzug EB912]]. Rogers and Barnes entered the train while Jones remained on the roof and made his way to the head of the train. Jones took Zola into custody; however, he later learned that Barnes had been killed during the mission.{{Ref|CATFA}} ====[[Attack on Hydra Headquarters]]==== {{Quote|[[Johann Schmidt|Schmidt]]'s working with powers beyond our capabilities. He gets across the Atlantic, he will wipe out the entire eastern seaboard in an hour."
"How much time we got?|[[Howard Stark]] and Gabe Jones|Captain America: The First Avenger}} Jones was present at the final assault against [[Hydra]] at [[Johann Schmidt]]'s [[Hydra Headquarters|fortress]] and was one of the last people to speak with [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] before he was lost to the ice.{{Ref|CATFA}} ==Abilities== *'''Expert Marksman''': Jones wielded a machine gun during [[World War II]] as his weapon of choice, using it to successfully raid many [[Hydra]] facilities across [[Europe]]. *'''Multilingualism''': Jones was fluent in his native English, as well as French and German, providing translations to his squad members. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''{{WPS|Thompson submachine gun#M1928A1|M1928A1 Thompson}}''': During [[World War II]], Jones used the standard firearm of the [[United States Army]] to battle Nazi forces during the [[Attack at Azzano]]. He also used it again during the assault on the [[Schnellzug EB912]] train to kidnap [[Arnim Zola]]. *'''{{WPS|Browning M1919A4}}''': [[File:Gabe M1919.jpg|thumb|250px|Jones charging into battle with his machine gun]] Jones carried this machine gun as his weapon of choice, and he used it during the [[Howling Commandos]]' raids on [[Hydra]] facilities and during the [[Attack on Hydra Headquarters]]. The gun is now on display at the [[Smithsonian Institution]]. ===Vehicles=== *'''[[Schnellzug EB912]]''': Jones was with the [[Howling Commandos]] as they [[Capture of Arnim Zola|infiltrated]] the Schnellzug EB912 with the goal of capturing [[Arnim Zola]]. The Commandos zip lined onto the top of the train, and Jones rode on top of it while [[Steve Rogers]] and [[Bucky Barnes]] infiltrated the train. While Zola was distracted by Rogers and Barnes, Jones boarded the train and held him at gunpoint, arresting them. ==Facilities== *'''[[Whip & Fiddle]]''': Jones and his fellow soldiers drank together at Whip & Fiddle, when they were approached by [[Steve Rogers]] and offered the chance to fight alongside him. *'''[[Strategic Scientific Reserve Headquarters]]''': Jones and the rest of the [[Howling Commandos]] would often meet at the headquarters to brainstorm plans to use against [[Hydra]] and take their next base. ===Prisons=== *'''[[Hydra Base Camp C3]]''': Jones was taken and held hostage in [[Hydra]]'s weapons facility, where he was forced to build weapons. However, he and the rest of the soldiers present broke out with help from [[Steve Rogers]]. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[United States Army]] **[[Chester Phillips]] † - Superior *[[Strategic Scientific Reserve]] **[[Peggy Carter]] † *[[Howling Commandos]] **[[Steve Rogers|Steve Rogers/Captain America]] - Former Leader **[[Bucky Barnes]] **[[Dum Dum Dugan]] **[[James Montgomery Falsworth]] † **[[Jim Morita]] † **[[Jacques Dernier]] † {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Hydra]] **[[Red Skull|Johann Schmidt/Red Skull]] **[[Arnim Zola]] † {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" width="100%" ! Appearances for Gabe Jones |- | {{Scroll box|content= |-|Chronological= In chronological order: *{{Appearance|CATFA}} **{{Appearance|CATFAA1}} **{{Appearance|CATFAA2}} **{{Appearance|CAFV7}} (flashbacks; concurrent events) **{{Appearance|CAFV6}} (concurrent events) **{{Appearance|CAFV7}} (concurrent events) **{{Appearance|CAFV8}} (concurrent events) *{{Appearance|CATWS}} (photo) *{{Appearance|AoS211}} (photo) *{{Appearance|SMH}} (photo) |-|Narrative= In narrative order: *{{Appearance|CATFA}} **{{Appearance|CATFAA1}} **{{Appearance|CATFAA2}} **{{Appearance|CAFV7}} (flashbacks; concurrent events) **{{Appearance|CAFV6}} (concurrent events) **{{Appearance|CAFV7}} (concurrent events) **{{Appearance|CAFV8}} (concurrent events) *{{Appearance|CATWS}} (photo) *{{Appearance|AoS211}} (photo) *{{Appearance|SMH}} (photo) }} |} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Gabe Jones was the first African-American regular supporting character. His relationship with [[Peggy Carter]] was one of the first interracial relationships in comics. ==Behind the Scenes== *Gabe Jones in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by {{WPS|Ron Canada}}. ==References== {{Gallery|Gabe Jones/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{WP}} *{{Marvel}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Captain America: The First Avenger Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Howard University Students]] [[Category:United States Army Soldiers]] [[Category:92nd Infantry Division Soldiers]] [[Category:Hydra Base Camp C3 Inmates]] [[Category:Howling Commandos Members]] [[Category:Strategic Scientific Reserve Soldiers]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]]
